creator: Tim Cochran

evidence.text: How do we fix this? What we like to do at ThoughtWorks is actually take a data-driven approach. We're going to start by looking at, what do engineers do during the day? The low effective one might be the client that called us. It's very obvious that the engineers are spending way too much time on things other than writing code, other than providing value. This is not actually that useful. It's not actually that actionable. I don't really know what to do about this. When we talk about the DevOps report, a lot of it is about feedback loops.
